articles.description: Around 7,500 workers participated in the protests, according to district administration officials.

articles.title: Pay cuts forced him out of a 30-year journalism career — his next job pays 3x more; All you need to know
articles.description: After leaving journalism at 53, Jim Lexa reinvented himself as a postal worker, earning nearly three times his former salary. He enjoys a stress-free job, good benefits, and increased fitness, averaging 30,000 to 40,000 steps daily.

articles.description: Three persons were arrested for cattle theft

topStories.title: Indonesia, US sign ‘major’ defence cooperation agreement
topStories.description: Signing of defence partnership follows reports that US is seeking overflight access in Indonesia for military planes.

topStories.title: Assembly Elections 2026 LIVE updates: Congress alleges TMC vandalised helipad ahead of Rahul's Raiganj rally
topStories.description: DMK president and Chief Minister M.K. Stalin turned the tables on AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K. Palaniswami by emphasising that, had she been alive, former Chief Minister Jayalalithaa would have opposed issues such as delimitation

topStories.title: Convicted Ex-Congress MLA Accuses BJP Of 'Rs 70 Crore Deal', Party Hits Back
topStories.description: The BJP dismissed the convicted ex-Congress MLA Rajendra Bharti's claims as "fiction".

topStories.title: Zanai Bhosle's First Post For 'Love Of Life' Asha Bhosle After Her Death
topStories.description: Zanai Bhosle wrote, " I realise that she lives on in every one of us in our hearts forever and she has seen it all from above"

topStories.title: GIFT Nifty jumps 200 pts amid renewed hopes for Iran-US peace talks. What to expect?
topStories.description: Dalal Street may witness a relief rally on Wednesday as GIFT Nifty surged nearly 200 points following reports of continued US-Iran peace talks. Despite initial plunges, global markets rallied as oil prices cooled and hopes for a diplomatic resolution emerged, with Wall Street and Asian markets showing gains.

topStories.title: US, Philippines Plan Record Military Drills as War Threats Grow
topStories.description: More than 17,000 military personnel will participate in the biggest-ever joint drills by the Philippines, the US and other nations as they rehearse warfighting skills amid tensions with China and conflicts in the Middle East.

topStories.title: Oil Price Today (April 14): Crude oil drops below $100 as Vance remarks boost Mideast de-escalation hopes
topStories.description: Oil prices retreated below $100 after fresh signs of US-Iran dialogue despite escalating tensions and a naval blockade. Markets remain volatile as supply disruptions persist and peace prospects stay uncertain. Analysts warn prices could stay elevated, with risks of further spikes if geopolitical tensions prolong and energy flows remain constrained.

topStories.title: US military kills two men in new strike on vessel in eastern Pacific
topStories.description: Latest attack brings death toll from US strikes on vessels in the Pacific and Caribbean to at least 170 since September.

topStories.title: Former Haryana CM Hooda blames low procurement of crop on government’s “arbitrary” new rules
topStories.description: Hooda has also issued directives to all Congress MLAs and senior leaders regarding this matter, and instructed them to visit all grain markets daily, summon officials to the site, and confront them with the ground realities

topStories.title: Anti-war protesters arrested in New York urging end to Israel weapon sales
topStories.description: Police in New York arrested around 100 anti-war protesters during a sit-in demanding an end to US arms for Israel.

topStories.description: Deputy CM DK Shivakumar warned Congress MLAs against public dissent while they pushed for a cabinet reshuffle, stressing party discipline and unity.

dailyNews.title: Those with pending appeals against exclusion in Bengal SIR can’t vote, says Supreme Court
dailyNews.description: The bench underscored that granting voting rights to those whose eligibility remains under adjudication would lead to untenable consequences.

dailyNews.title: Dave McGinnis, former Cardinals head coach and beloved Titans assistant, dead at 74
dailyNews.description: Dave McGinnis, former Arizona Cardinals head coach and longtime Tennessee Titans assistant coach and broadcaster, has died at age 74 after an illness.

dailyNews.title: Lena Dunham says her dad didn’t want to be seen voting with her in Obama election
dailyNews.description: Lena Dunham recalls her father not wanting to vote with her during the 2012 Obama-Romney election after she faced intense online hate and backlash.

dailyNews.title: 'Smart decision': Swalwell's resignation spurs praise from both parties after bombshell allegations emerge
dailyNews.description: Rep. Eric Swalwell, D-Calif., announced he was planning to resign from Congress following sexual misconduct allegations, leading top Democrats in the U.S. Senate to praise the decision.

dailyNews.title: Los Angeles hotel industry 'struggling' under wage mandate signed by Mayor Karen Bass, new survey finds
dailyNews.description: An industry research report claims Los Angeles' minimum wage mandate led to reduced hiring, labor hour cuts, and delayed hotel development as costs outpace revenue growth.

dailyNews.title: US military kills 2 suspected cartel operatives in latest Eastern Pacific lethal strike, SOUTHCOM says
dailyNews.description: The U.S. military killed two men believed to be cartel operatives in the Eastern Pacific as part of broader efforts to disrupt narcotics trafficking.

dailyNews.title: Ro Khanna confronted by voter on California immigration policies in Jubilee appearance
dailyNews.description: Rep. Ro Khanna faces off with speaker Marien over immigration enforcement, California border security, and Epstein scandal accountability standards.

dailyNews.title: Swalwell's 'best friend' in Congress turns on him after bombshell allegations torpedo his political career
dailyNews.description: Sen. Ruben Gallego, D-Ariz., distanced himself from Rep. Eric Swalwell, D-Calif., calling him unfit for Congress after allegations of sexual assault and misconduct.

dailyNews.title: Dick Vitale announces fifth cancer diagnosis as biopsy confirms melanoma in his lung and liver cavity
dailyNews.description: Dick Vitale said he is confident he will go "5 for 5" after a biopsy confirmed melanoma in his lung and liver cavity for his fifth cancer diagnosis.

dailyNews.title: Alec Baldwin admits he 'doesn’t want to work anymore' after 'Rust' shooting death: 'I want to retire'
dailyNews.description: Alec Baldwin reflects on his career after the fatal "Rust" set shooting in 2021, saying the painful tragedy has left him wanting to retire and stay home.

dailyNews.title: JD Vance says the ball is 'in Iran’s court' after Pakistan peace talks stall
dailyNews.description: VP JD Vance rejects reports Pakistan talks failed, says Iran negotiations made progress but Iranian team was unable to finalize a deal in talks.

dailyNews.title: WNBA player opposes new Olympics transgender policy, saying they do 'anything but' protect women
dailyNews.description: WNBA player Brianna Turner criticized the International Olympic Committee's new policies barring biologically male athletes in female sports in a USA Today op-ed.

topStories.title: What Iran offered to do with its nuclear programme? Why did Trump walk away?
topStories.description: United States and Iran traded proposals for a suspension of Iranian nuclear activities during weekend negotiations in Pakistan, but remain far apart on the length of any agreement, according to Iranian and US officials.

topStories.title: DoorDash driver hails key Trump policy after delivering McDonald's to White House: 'I'm going to enjoy it'
topStories.description: DoorDash driver Sharron Simmons says she hopes Trump's no-tax-on-tips benefit in the One Big Beautiful Bill extends beyond its current 2028 expiration.

topStories.title: Gabbard claims ‘coordinated effort’ by intelligence community to advance narrative to impeach Trump
topStories.description: DNI Tulsi Gabbard releases declassified testimony she says exposes a coordinated effort to manufacture a narrative behind Trump's first impeachment.

topStories.title: Butler man’s online rants to kill Trump end in guilty plea after FBI probe
topStories.description: Shawn Monper pleaded guilty to making threats to assassinate President Trump and kill ICE agents in posts on YouTube, according to the Justice Department.

topStories.title: U.S. Is Negotiating an Iran Deal That Would Buy Time, Again
topStories.description: The United States proposed a 20-year “suspension” of all nuclear activity, even as President Trump demands assurances that Iran can never build a nuclear weapon.

topStories.title: What the U.S. Blockade of Iran and the Strait of Hormuz Might Look Like
topStories.description: The U.S. military has provided few details on how it might carry out President Trump’s orders as he seeks to pressure Tehran on a peace deal. But history and established practices offer some clues.

topStories.title: Trump’s Explanation for an Image of Himself as Jesus: ‘I Thought It Was Me as a Doctor’
topStories.description: The image showed President Trump bathed in divine light and clad in religious robes. His interpretation was that the image depicted him as a doctor, not Jesus Christ.

topStories.title: With Algeria Visit, Pope Leo Returns to His Augustinian Roots
topStories.description: Some theologians say the pontiff’s understanding of Augustine’s teachings helped inform his response to President Trump’s negative comments about him.

topStories.title: Vance Says Pope Leo Should Stay Out of U.S. Affairs
topStories.description: The vice president, a Catholic, defended President Trump, who had accused the pope of being too liberal and “weak on crime.” The pontiff has said that he has “no fear of the Trump administration.”

topStories.title: Trump’s Erratic Behavior and Extreme Comments Revive Mental Health Debate
topStories.description: As the president threatens to wipe out Iran and attacks the pope, even some former allies and advisers are questioning whether he has grown increasingly unbalanced, describing him as “lunatic” and “clearly insane.”

topStories.title: Trump and MAGA Embraced Orban. Now, They’re Worried by His Loss in Hungary’s Election.
topStories.description: Viktor Orban, the Hungarian prime minister, and his right-wing playbook were embraced by parts of the American right. Now some are worried by his defeat.

topStories.title: 4/13: The Takeout with Major Garrett
topStories.description: Trump continues to slam Pope Leo over Iran opposition; Eric Swalwell announces he'll resign from Congress.

dailyNews.title: What to know about Trump's Iran blockade and the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: The United States’ plan to blockade Iranian ports and marine traffic has sent oil prices surging, as the countries reignited their tussle over the crucial Strait of Hormuz after peace talks ended without a deal

dailyNews.title: Trump facing backlash for posting AI-generated image depicting him as Jesus Christ
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted an AI-generated image depicting himself as a Christ-like figure. The post was taken down but there was swift backlash, including from MAGA Republicans. It comes as President Trump is locked in a growing feud with Pope Leo. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

dailyNews.title: President Trump's public feud with Pope Leo
dailyNews.description: NBC News' Claudio Lavanga joins "Here's the Scoop" after speaking with Pope Leo XIV about President Donald Trump's criticism on Truth Social.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: US proposes 20-year suspension on Iranian uranium enrichment
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin agrees to fly pride flag at Stonewall National Monument
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration agreed to fly the rainbow flag at the Stonewall National Monument in NYC as part a resolution to a lawsuit challenging NPS's removal of the flag.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  The top internet searches surrounding Trump's now deleted AI post
dailyNews.description: An AI-generated image that President Donald Trump posted Monday on his social media platform that depicted him as a Jesus-like figure is drawing criticism and interest online.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
